reviews.review_description: Not only does the game glitch more than normal as is usual for VR games but sometimes me or my cousins can't pick up things, can't see orders etc

developer_response.body: Hi! We are really sorry that you had such a horrible time and we have been working hard to improve the game! We just released a new version with a huge truckload of Bug Fixes, Visual Improvements and cool features like our special Easter Egg Hunt. We would be glad if you check it out and help us with your Feedback. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I like the scenery and the fact that there are numerous kitchens to go through. It is a little glitchy though. You get a faint glow of different foods on the table making it a little hard to focus on the food you want. It’s also difficult to get the various foods into the hamburger bun. Keep working on it, it could be a lot of fun.
